question: Design a `Student` class with private members `studentName` (string), `studentID` (int), and `grade` (char). Implement a default constructor, a parameterized constructor, and public `get` methods for all members. Also, add a `printStudentDetails()` method.

test_cases.input: No direct input, uses hardcoded Student objects.
test_cases.expected:
Default Student Details:
Name: N/A
ID: 0
Grade: F

Parameterized Student Details:
Name: Alice Smith
ID: 101
Grade: A

Another Student Details:
Name: Bob Johnson
ID: 205
Grade: B
test_cases.actual_output_pattern:
Default Student Details:
Name: N/A
ID: 0
Grade: 0

Parameterized Student Details:
Name: Alice Smith
ID: 101
Grade: 101

Another Student Details:
Name: Bob Johnson
ID: 205
Grade: 205

errors: The printStudentDetails() method incorrectly prints the studentID value where the grade should be displayed. It prints the integer ID instead of the character grade.
